# jubs.studio

> Design engineering solo studio by Julia Hoffmann Buratto (@jubscodes). Opinionated UI kits and AI design tools for developers and agents.

## Skills

Currently building front-end + design systems at Shippit. Core skills:

- Design systems — Figma → Tailwind handoff, shadcn ecosystem, token-based architecture
- Front-end engineering — React 19, Next.js 16, TypeScript, static export
- AI coding tools — rules files for Claude Code/Cursor agents, design+build inside the IDE
- Onchain UX — KYC flows, transaction design, fintech compliance UX
- Product design + leadership — cofounded Notus, led product+design through launch
- Technical writing — design specs, AI rules, contribution guides

Reach out for collaboration, technical questions, or trading notes via LinkedIn or X.

## About

jubs.studio is a design engineering solo studio focused on building opinionated developer tools that bridge design and code. Founded by Julia Hoffmann Buratto, a design engineer who builds UI component libraries and AI-powered design tooling.

## Projects

### CypherCN (UI Kit — Alpha)
Terminal-inspired component stylization for the shadcn ecosystem. 60+ components with phosphor glow effects, CRT scanlines, box-drawing borders, and monospace typography. Dark mode native. WCAG AA accessible.
- Install: `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @cyphercn/button`
- Repository: https://github.com/jubscodes/cyphercn

### Get Shit Pretty — GSP (Dev Tool)
Design engineering for AI coding tools. A complete design pipeline that runs in your terminal — research, brand, design system, UI, specs, review, build, launch. Ships with 9 specialized agents and 11 skills. Works with Claude Code, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, and Codex CLI.
- Install: `npx get-shit-pretty`
- Repository: https://github.com/jubscodes/get-shit-pretty

## Selected work

### Shippit (2025 — present, Design Engineer)
Built front-end for an agentic AI platform. Authored AI rules, refactored the codebase, established a design system that scales with the product.
URL: https://jubs.studio/projects/shippit/

### Chainless (2023 — 2025, Cofounder · Product & Design at Notus)
Cofounded Notus and led product + design for Chainless, a Brazilian crypto fintech. Designed KYC and transaction UX. Launched at Blockchain Rio. Managed the design team.
URL: https://jubs.studio/projects/chainless/

### Heimdall (2022 — 2023, Solo Designer)
Sole designer for a crypto data platform. Built a complete design system in Figma — typography, color, components — aligned with Tailwind for dev handoff.
URL: https://jubs.studio/projects/heimdall/

## Recognition

- Showcase — Cursor Coffee, Florianópolis 2026 — showcased projects designed and built end-to-end inside Cursor
- Builder Residency — Avalanche Innovation House, Buenos Aires 2024 — three-month residency with the Notus team
- 1st Place (Aurora track) — ETH Samba Hackathon 2023 — The Gens, a generative NFT collection with ticket-to-mint UX
- Best LayerZero — Avalanche Summit Hackathon (Encode Club), Barcelona 2022 — AnyDAO, a cross-chain governance protocol
